examples: Labour seemed to have secured the biggest celebrity endorsement of the campaign: Peppa Pig, eponymous star of the children's franchise.
Most visitors make for the eponymous central temple.
The eponymous shape of the product Thomas Edison invented in 1879 was no accident.
The eponymous capsules look like the sleeping berths on a particularly traditional Japanese spaceship.
Colangelo described casino magnate Steve Wynn's eponymous hotel on the Strip as USA Basketball's home.
